audit.title: LAM release tree and test-suite audit
audit.version_clarification: User confirmed that prior 0.6.0 task labels referred to 0.6.1
audit.scope: D:/ResearchLibrary repository with D:/ResearchLibrary/LAM_tools as the standalone source root
audit.policy: Potential user data and historical research material were reported but not deleted

entries.notes: Runtime package source; package resources are included through package-data

entries.path: README.md, AGENTS.md, Workflows.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, pyproject.toml
entries.binary_release: selected release documents or synchronized package resources only
entries.notes: Canonical repository documentation and build metadata
Deterministic default tests plus explicitly marked live tests
Tutorials, release tooling and source-build infrastructure
Exactly four project-generated synthetic PDFs validated by the corpus manifest
Small deterministic fixtures and manifest contract
Repository release evidence; excluded from standalone package archives
Editor, agent and local developer state
May contain historical research PDFs; contents were not deleted or redistributed

entries.path: 开发资料/* 版本审计资料/
entries.notes: Superseded planning/audit files grouped by source version; distinct originals and zh-CN variants retained
16 PyInstaller build files, 267073374 bytes
7297 files from the obsolete LAM-0.6.0 frozen build, 826543692 bytes
Empty render directory and seven Python cache directories removed; no pytest cache remained
Tracked zero-byte obsolete entry file
Retired compatibility tombstone removed at user request; regression now requires the historical entrypoint to be absent
Outdated policy backup removed at user request
Real library metadata; untracked and excluded
Real library documents and exports; untracked and excluded
Real derived library state; formal cleanup removed 40 allowlisted entries and conservatively skipped 24 unknown temporary artifacts
Local configuration/secrets; file contents were not read
Excluded without content inspection because it is not needed for release

deleted: 40 allowlisted LAM cleanup entries containing 48 files
moved_or_standardized: Legacy schema generator moved from tests/conftest.py to tests/fixtures/legacy/factory.py
Legacy preflight coverage moved into the document-migration test module
Workflow 3 document tests converted from migrated legacy setup to current-schema fixtures
Workflows_backup0714.md archived under 开发资料/0.3.2 版本审计资料 after exact Git-blob identification
CLI_AUDIT_0.5.0.md and MIGRATION_0.5.0.md archived under 开发资料/0.5.0 版本审计资料

awaiting_user_confirmation: Which of the 89 actual untracked release-candidate files should be staged for the release commit
Whether future evidence can safely classify the 24 cleanup-skipped unknown temporary artifacts

test_isolation.implicit_LIBRARY_ROOT: cleared at session start and rejected by Settings
test_isolation.project_dotenv: not loaded when LAM_TESTING is true
test_isolation.elevated_windows_token: blocked at session start without bypass
test_isolation.default_network: socket connect/create_connection/connect_ex blocked except explicitly selected live markers
test_isolation.business_outputs: fixtures use tmp_path outside the repository and real library

git_audit.counting_note: The prior 63 count was based on grouped git status paths; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard reports 89 physical untracked files
git_audit.release_readiness: not ready for git archive until intended untracked source/test/docs files are staged and reviewed

source_distribution_audit.warning: Setuptools reported the project.license table form as deprecated for a future release; no content leak resulted

tests.focused: 38 passed during the release-tree audit; 8 passed after historical-entrypoint deletion and cleanup
